calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-18-2024 Continued To Jan-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Gilbert Yee Jay appeared in person for Camelia-Kam Fung Ng (proposed administrator).

Discussion was held regarding related matters PES-01-282440 Estate of Lew Yue Hone Wong and PES-23- 305699 Estate of Denny Ng, that the only real property at issue is the property located at Sacramento Street, that Mr. Jay plans on filing his petition in the old case PES-01-282440. Mr. Jay also stated that he has not had any contact with Mr. Bresler and that he does not return his phone calls. Petition for Letter of Administration is continued to January 06, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Account Petition in PES-23- 305699 Estate of Denny Ng is continued to January 6, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition to Reopen Estate in PES-01-282440 Estate of Lew Yue Hone Wong is set for January 6 , 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
